name: Apricot Jello Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the crushed pineapple with juice and 1/2 cup sugar in a saucepan.
2. Heat over medium heat until all ingredients are well combined and heated through.
3. Remove from heat and let cool completely to room temperature.
4. Once cooled, mix in the softened light cream cheese and Cool Whip Lite®.
5. Chill the mixture in the refrigerator until ready to serve.
